text1: The contract starts on July 1 and renews every 12 months unless either party gives notice.
text2: The agreement begins on July 1 and auto-renews annually unless one side opts out.

text2: The moon completes an orbit around Mars every 27.3 days.

text2: Support is open on weekdays from 9 AM to 6 PM IST.
